authority: Authoritative parent registry for the General Frontier. Binds each F-series parent's identity, architecture, source, claim scope, and honest status. Only F0 has real measured evidence; F2/F3 are source-absent prep-only; F4 is optional and admission-gated.

boundaries.cuda_lane: blocked on budget (no sealed HAWKING_CLOUD_BUDGET; not inferred from key presence)
boundaries.giant_lanes: blocked on source (F2/F3 absent; F4 optional + admission-gated)

parents.adapter_status: active_foundry (full-rank Product-Quantization Forge built: 7 verbs + protected precision islands + Doctor)
parents.apple_status: proven (M3 Ultra 28-core, MPS; CPU/Metal parity verified; sole real compute lane = Gate-F Apple)
parents.attention_type: gqa_sliding_window_sinks (64 q-heads, 8 kv-heads, head_dim 64, sliding_window 128, attention sinks)
parents.claim_scope: whole-artifact BPW; full 128-expert complete-scope streaming pack; sub-bit-first
parents.cuda_status: not_required (Apple-only lane for F0; CUDA lane N/A)

gravity_policy.launch: COMPLETE (Second Light run ignited + completed; lease released)
gravity_policy.note: root oracle of the F-series; the only parent with real measured evidence

parents.quality_status: NEGATIVE at sub-bit (Second Light complete: realized whole-artifact ~0.770 BPW, output-div ~0.69, NO capability pass, NO Event Horizon crossed)
parents.runtime_status: proven (full-128-expert streaming packer ~10-20s/row; CPU/Metal parity; durable singleton controller crash/resume)

source_manifest.status: RESTORED + VERIFIED (every file sha256'd, all shards full-size, headers parse)

parents.source_precision: MXFP4 experts (FP4 blocks + UE8 scales) + BF16 attn/router/norm/embed
parents.streaming_status: proven (bounded per-expert source windows; complete 128-expert scope streamed)
unbound_or_estimated: total_params/active_params are published nominal (116.8B total, ~5.1B active top-4/128); config.json carries no param count
architecture name GptOssForCausalLM is the standard gpt-oss HF arch (config.json has no architectures field)

Reserved mid-tier slot in the F0..F4 ladder. No model, contract, or source is bound. Not described by the Part 4 spec (which enumerates F0/F2/F3/F4). Documented here only so the F0..F4 index is complete and the gap is explicit, not silent. Populate at admission of a mid-tier (~200-400B-class) parent if/when one is admitted.

claim_scope.separation: text-core and full-multimodal claims are explicitly separated; only TEXT_CORE is in-scope for sub-bit condensation first

status_legend.active_foundry: Forge + runtime built and run on real source; has measured evidence (F0)
status_legend.optional_blocked: contract exists; optional post-frontier; admission-gated; NOT activated (F4)

status_legend.source_absent_prep_only: contract exists; source absent locally; prep only, no run (F2, F3)
